summary_en: 265,000 shares (2.03% of issued S/O, excluding treasury) to be acquired for up to ¥700M between May 18–July 31, 2026 via open-market purchase. Rationale: strengthen shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency as part of medium-term management plan.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: Yushiro Inc. announced on May 15, 2026 that its board of directors has authorized the acquisition of treasury shares. The company will acquire up to 265,000 ordinary shares (2.03% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a combined maximum of ¥700 million. The acquisition period runs from May 18 through July 31, 2026 via open-market purchase. The stated objective is to strengthen shareholder returns and enhance capital efficiency as part of the company's medium-term management plan. As of April 30, 2026, the company had issued 13,024,420 shares (excluding treasury) and held 875,645 treasury shares.
